blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 8,112 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
